nasb.text: “Son of man, prophesy and say, ‘Thus says the Lord.’ Say, ‘A sword, a sword sharpened And also polished!

esv.text: “Son of man, prophesy and say, Thus says the Lord, say: “A sword, a sword is sharpened and also polished,

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要預言，說：‘主耶和華這樣說： 有一把刀，有一把磨利了的刀， 是擦亮了的刀；

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要说预言，告诉他们，耶和华这样说， “‘有一把刀， 有一把刀磨快擦亮了，
